'''Gowan Ch'lessan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] and a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==Biography==
A native of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], he was inspired to join the Alliance while listening to speeches made by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]. He became the slicer on [[Koris Haslam]]'s commando team and participated in several missions, including the [[Mission to Selnesh|rescue]] of [[Gebnerret Vibrion]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] prison on [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]]. Gowan entered the prison disguised as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]], and was responsible for slicing into the main computer and disabling the prison's lone [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]], allowing the team's transport to escape with Vibrion. Following the raid, he comforted Dr. [[Aurin Leith]], who was upset over having to kill a stormtrooper during the mission, which broke her doctor's oath.<ref name="Harm" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Do No Harm|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
